title: Operational Form
description: Operational Form v1 contract for the required OPF-01 through OPF-12 operational forms. Forms must carry form code/type, source object, generated/inherited fields, confirmation, evidence, audit, and status.
$comment: Sources: docs/documents/0. appendices/01-OPERATIONAL-FORMS.md, 02-AUTO-GENERATED-FORM-RULES.md, and 05-MATERIAL-PACKAGING-TAXONOMY.md. Per-form payloads remain bounded by this shared form envelope.

form_code.description: Operational form code, e.g. OPF-01 through OPF-12.

previous_form_id.description: Previous form inherited by this form when applicable.

form_sequence.description: Expected sequence in the operational form chain when applicable.

production_profile_id.description: Original production profile/source profile when forms inherit from it.

auto_generated_fields.description: Fields auto-generated or auto-pulled by the system; not operator-entered business logic.

manual_fields.description: Fields that operators are allowed to enter manually when source documents allow.

allowed_actions.description: Allowed form actions for the current state. Actions must be permission-checked and audit-safe.

confirmations.description: Personal confirmation block required before transitions.

misa_checkpoint.description: Whether this form can create or represent a MISA checkpoint.
